rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: Rate hikes loom despite slowing inflation
news.snippet: Government fuel excise cuts may have delivered a short-term inflation reprieve but there are still fears the Reserve Bank could raise interest rates again.

news.title: ASX slides after fresh US strikes on Iran and a choppy session on Wall Street
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket declined in early trade after US forces carried out new airstrikes on Iran, with a resolution to the war that began nearly three months ago remaining elusive.

news.title: Commonwealth Bank CEO backs capital gains tax changes for property investors
news.snippet: The boss of Australia’s largest bank has made his feelings known on the government's controversial changes to capital gains tax.

news.title: ‘Ban the cowboys’: Super giant’s clickbait fight
news.snippet: One of Australia’s largest superannuation funds has demanded a ban on social media financial advice ads after thousands of Australians lost $1bn.

news.title: ClearVue solar glass tech to power Canva Sydney HQ
news.snippet: ClearVue has won a $600,000 contract to supply solar glazing, balustrades and rooftop panels for Canva’s new Sydney headquarters.

news.title: Pacgold kicks off aggressive gold growth push at SA production play
news.snippet: Pacgold Ltd has fired up the drill rig at its South Australian Vertigo deposit, kicking off follow-up resource growth campaigns as production ramps up at its fresh White Dam project.

news.title: Trump might tear up ‘the best deal ever made’
news.snippet: US President Donald Trump is taking aim at America’s neighbours as he opens a new front in his trade wars.

news.title: Critical Resources hails sulphur-free battery breakthrough
news.snippet: Critical Resources says its sulphur-free battery electrolyte has delivered room-temperature results comparable to those of leading sulphide-class materials.

news.title: West Wits breaks into ready-made South African gold production zones
news.snippet: West Wits Mining has completed its 1 West decline and struck historic high-grade stopes at Qala Shallows in South Africa, potentially shaving a year off mine development.

news.title: Horizon revives historic WA gold camp with massive drilling blitz
news.snippet: Horizon Gold is eying a potential three-million-ounce gold inventory at its WA Gum Creek project, armed with an 80,000m drill blitz, underground upside and a booming gold price.

news.title: Reuters executive set to be new ABC News boss
news.snippet: Simon Robinson, an Australian currently based in London, has been chosen to lead ABC News, according to three sources with knowledge of the matter.

news.title: Millions of Aussies to save on power bills
news.snippet: Many Australian households will have lower power bills this winter, but welfare groups says more needs to be done to help the most vulnerable.
